artifact.description: The concrete code unit, data structure, or generated schedule surface changed by the intervention.

configuration.description: The concrete parameter values, flags, sizes, or structural settings changed by the intervention.

mechanism.description: The claimed causal mechanism connecting the intervention to correctness or simulated cycle count.

context.description: The baseline revision, workload regime, constraints, and preconditions under which the intervention is tested.

epistemic.description: The specific uncertainty or hypothesis that the experiment resolves.

behavior.description: The expected measurable cycle-count, correctness, or execution signature that would support or contradict the hypothesis.

duplicate_policy.base_projection_policy: Git and artifact hashes establish exact identity and provenance only; novelty depends on the plan-conditioned semantic base projection.
duplicate_policy.covered_unit: A verifier-backed conditional experiment or active reservation.
duplicate_policy.duplicate: Materially equivalent relevant base conditions and intervention delta with an already-covered information target.
duplicate_policy.target_state_entailment: Prior Evidence entails the same verified target state and the proposal adds no marginal-effect or order information.
not_automatically_novel: more detailed wording without a materially narrower experiment
